DocumentationExampleCode.Code: meta-weave new-workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Source --model SourceModel --workspace-path .\Source.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Target --model TargetModel --workspace-path .\Target.Workspace meta-weave add-binding --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --name CustomerName --source-model Source --source-entity Customer --source-property Name --target-model Target --target-entity Customer --target-property CustomerName meta-weave check --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave materialize --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --model TargetModel --new-workspace .\Materialized.Workspace
